items.title: Industrial Electrician

items.phase_label: Scanning Midland field talent and warming the first conversations.

candidate_signals.note: Strong industrial depth and same-week availability.

candidate_signals.headline: Senior Industrial Electrician | Data Center & Energy
candidate_signals.note: Local fit with active reply signal.

candidate_signals.headline: Field Electrical Lead | High-Voltage Systems
candidate_signals.note: Strong buyer-fit profile if shortlist expands.

items.title: PLC Technician
items.summary: Automation search balancing controls depth, travel flexibility and fast buyer response expectations.
items.phase_label: Tightening controls filters and opening Houston automation channels.

candidate_signals.note: Strong controls stack and clean travel history.

candidate_signals.headline: Automation Technician | Brownfield Retrofits
candidate_signals.note: Buyer-native project background and quick response pace.

items.title: Site Safety Manager
items.summary: Safety leadership search focused on plant discipline, crew credibility and buyer confidence under time pressure.

candidate_signals.headline: EHS Leader | Refinery & Turnaround Ops
candidate_signals.note: Strong plant credibility and local access.

candidate_signals.headline: Safety Supervisor | Industrial Maintenance
candidate_signals.note: Good backup signal if the buyer wants a second finalist.

items.title: Field Service Mechanic

items.phase_label: Keeping heavy-equipment conversations warm while the shortlist firms up.
